<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Modern Minimalist](10-modern-minimalist.jpg)

For the architect, the gallery owner, the friend whose flat is mostly white. Three white calla lilies, a single architectural anthurium leaf, and that's it. Looks best in a tall slender vase.

## What's in it

- Calla lilies (3 stems, white)
- Anthurium leaf
- No fillers, no greens

## Care

Calla stems split and curl in plain water — add a drop of bleach or a sachet of flower food.
